ddls:
CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the software package */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the package */,
  "heaviness_score" REAL /* Heaviness score indicating the impact on software performance */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the package */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the package was updated */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the package is distributed */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the package repository */,
  "maintainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who maintains the package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_maintainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("maintainer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency relationship */,
  "parent_package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent package */,
  "child_package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child package */,
  "version_requirement" TEXT /* Version requirement for the dependency */,
  "is_optional" INTEGER /* Indicates if the dependency is optional */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_child_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_parent_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import relationship */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the importing package */,
  "imported_package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the imported package */,
  "import_methods" INTEGER /* Number of methods imported */,
  "import_classes" INTEGER /* Number of classes imported */,
  "import_type" TEXT /* Type of import (e.g., direct, transitive) */,
  "import_path" TEXT /* Path or module from which the import is made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_imports_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_imports_imported_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("imported_package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "required_packages" (
  "required_package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each required package */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package requiring the dependency */,
  "required_package_name" TEXT /* Name of the required package */,
  "required_package_description" TEXT /* Description of the required package */,
  "version_range" TEXT /* Version range for the required package */,
  "is_optional" INTEGER /* Indicates if the required package is optional */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("required_package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_required_packages_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the software project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team working on the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_packages" (
  "project_package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-package relationship */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package used in the project */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the package used in the project */,
  "last_used_date" TEXT /* Last date the package was used in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_packages_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_packages_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string containing the user's permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the package */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the package was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)
